base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of items_and_objects — a pickup_item (currency) from 1988 super mario bros 3. All power-ups + objects — Super Mushroom/Fire Flower/Super Leaf/Tanooki Suit/Frog Suit/Hammer Suit/Starman/Kuribo's Shoe/P-Wing/Anchor/Warp Whistle/Music Box/Cloud/Jugem's Cloud/Hammer/1UP/Coin + pipe/cannon/note-block/P-switch/warp-door. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: All power-ups + objects — Super Mushroom/Fire Flower/Super Leaf/Tanooki Suit/Frog Suit/Hammer Suit/Starman/Kuribo's Shoe/P-Wing/Anchor/Warp Whistle/Music Box/Cloud/Jugem's Cloud/Hammer/1UP/Coin + pipe/cannon/note-block/P-switch/warp-door
